snippet.title: Sheesha (Official Music Video) | Mitta Ror ft. Swara Verma | Sorab Bedi | Niharika Tiwari
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened. The real ‚Äúowners of the song‚ÄĚ have all assembled together! Watch Sorab Bedi and Niharika Tiwari join Mitta Ror for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song Sheesha.

Audio Credits:
Performed by Mitta Ror, Swara Verma
Written and Composed by Mitta Ror
Music Production by Yeah Ishwar

Video Credits:
Starring Sorab Bedi, Niharika Tiwari & Mitta Ror
Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer 
1st Ad - Jass
Dop - Munish Shunty
Editor - CutsbyNav ( Navraj)
Colorist - Mr Luv
Production- Kainth Production ( Gagan)
Choreographer- Amit syal
Jib - Sonu
Makeup - Guru and Team
Hair - Sahil ( Barber king )
Art director - Kaka Art
Costume- Rajat Manchanda
Camera - cenidream
Focus puller - Gaggu
Editor - Cuts By Nav
VFX  - Rahul (the.vfx.wala)
BTS - J Singh & Ashu Dadwal
USA production: 
Front Line Production @spicegridproductions @gigipanwar
Assistant DOP @stablefilms

Lyrics:

Teri Aage Peechhe Laage
Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove
Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke
Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale
Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jib Te Re Pakda
yo Hath Tanne Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To
Ghabrandi Phiru Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su

Tere Paida Mein ye Paid
Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit
Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein
Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyaar Aale Gaane Main To
Gaan Laagi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala
Bhoot Mere Pe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe
Landi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Manne Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh
Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera
Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Doob Gaya Main Billi Billi
Aankhya Mein Bairan
Teri Hansi Ke Hansi
Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe
Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Mein
Pair bhi na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe
Ghane Bair Chhori Re
Tu Fursat Te Ghadi
I Think Meri Jaan
Hoth Tere Laal
Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid
Tu Mila ke Chaliye
Teri Gel Deun Gaane
Main Sync Meri Jaan

ho Aankhya Aalya Maarya
Tanne Teer Chhore Re
Mere Dil Ne yu Gaya
Jama Cheer Chhore Re
ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe
Manne Kuch Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage
Se Ameer Chhore Re
Teri Meri Jodi Ke Re
Laage Na Nazar
Main To Mandira Mein
Dive Makha Landi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su

Kise Paache Itne Na Phire
Jitne Tere Pichhe Bhatak Rahe Hai
Laa Ke Chhati Se Keh De Na I Love You
Chhore Tere Ke Saans Atak Rahe Hai

#sheesha #mittaror #sorika #sorabbedi #niharikatiwari #trending2026 #viralharyanvi #newmusic

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D‚ÄôSouza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director‚Äôs Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.description:

#BhoothBanglaTeaser out now!

snippet.title: The Furious (2026) Official Trailer - Xie Miao, Joe Taslim
snippet.description:
The Furious - Watch the trailer now! In Theaters on May 29. Starring Xie Miao, Joe Taslim, and Yang Enyou. Co-starring Brian Le, Joey Iwanaga, Sahajak Boonthanakit, Manatsanun Phanlerdwongsakul, Guo Junqing, and Winai Wiangyangkung. Special appearances by Yayan Ruhian and Jija Yanin. Directed by Kenji Tanigaki.

Subscribe to the LIONSGATE: YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.lionsgate.com/movies/
https://www.facebook.com/lionsgate
https://twitter.com/lionsgate
https://www.instagram.com/lionsgate/
https://www.tiktok.com/@lionsgate

#TheFurious

After the daughter of Wang Wei (Xie Miao) is kidnapped by a criminal network and he receives no help from the corrupt police, Wei sets out on a rampage to find her himself. His only ally is Navin (Joe Taslim) ‚Äď a relentless journalist whose wife has mysteriously disappeared. Fueled by a furious vengeance, the unlikely duo ruthlessly fights against the kidnappers in this explosive martial arts showdown.

snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


‚ÄúTimi Ho‚ÄĚ  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

‚ÄúTimi Ho‚ÄĚ is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Ghaamchhaya | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
This is me and the band performing ‚ÄúGhaamchhaya‚ÄĚ live at GhaamChhaya Intimate. It‚Äôs the title track from the album ‚ÄúGhaamChhaya,‚ÄĚ and it talks about how someone‚Äôs absence can truly hurt. Accepting it hurts even more. I really love this song, and I hope you do too.

Stream GhaamChhaya on all streaming platforms now 

Keys / Vocals ‚ÄĒ Yabesh Thapa

Sarangi ‚ÄĒ Kiran Maharjan
Flute ‚ÄĒ Shrijan Maharjan
Cello ‚ÄĒ Iva Maharjan
Violin ‚ÄĒ Pheobe Shrestha
Audio Engineer ‚ÄĒ Neerab Shrestha

snippet.title: PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II - FT. #4T #HORAA #ASI8 #SCYTES #LF #DRS #A1
snippet.description:
WELCOME TO PUBG MOBILE 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II

One of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE competitive tournaments in South Asia returns with a new chapter. 

Top teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Mongolia enter the battlefield to compete in a high-intensity, multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high-pressure fights.

Across multiple days of action, every match will test consistency, teamwork, and decision-making.
Every elimination matters. Every rotation counts. Every moment can change the leaderboard. 

Expect clutch plays, aggressive pushes, and top tier PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves.

Only one team will rise above all and be crowned the Ultimate Grind Champion.

The grind begins now.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Keunikannya terletak pada hampir semua hal di ROBLOX dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun ‚ÄĒ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

"I Like Me Better"

To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burning through the hours talking

Damn

I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

I don't know what it is but I got that feeling
Waking up in this bed next to you, swear the room yeah it got no ceiling

I might have to tell you something

Damn

I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Stay awhile stay awhile
Stay here with me
Stay awhile stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile stay awhile
Stay here with me
Lay here with me
Yeah, yeah

I like me better when I'm with you
(Yes, I do, yes, I do, babe)
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

I like me, I like me
Look who you made me, made me, oh no
Better when

I like me better when I'm with you

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke‚Ä¶
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith ke‚Ä¶. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke ‚Ä¶. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath ke‚Ä¶
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

‚Ėļ About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa‚Äôs diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

Tadha gayau timi, malai chhoder
Khayeka bacha ani, bishwaslai toder
Binti garchhu timilai, dui haat joder
Farki aideu priya, bato moder

Tadhai bhaepani, manko maya mardaina
Antai khusi chhau bhane, Farki aaunu pardaina

Nafarkine gari gayau, maile chahera ni rokna sakin
Aansule koreko shabdama, timi nai timi chhau kina?

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo‚Ä¶

Timro tasbir herdai, raatbhari bolchhu
Kalpanamai bhaepani, manko kura kholchhu
Samjhinchhu ti dinharu, jaba saathma timi thiyau
Maya magda badlama, kina dhoka diyau

Thaha chha timi aba, Farkera aaudaina
Maile jati aansu bagaeni, timilai paaudaina

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo‚Ä¶

Khusi hunu josanga chhau, timro bato chhekdina
Tadhai janu madekhi, aba timilai rokdina
Birsiera jau malai, samjhanama naaos
Maile paae jasto dhoka, timile napaos

Arko janma hunchha bhane, bhetna chhaina timilai
Badla lina aafnai mutu, retnu chhaina timilai
Fateko man aba, yaadko siyole siundchhu
Yo juni ta kebal, timrai naam ma jiundchhu

Bachnu chhaina aba malai mutu dukhaayera
Gahro bho haasna aba aansu lukaayera

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo

Tadha gayau timi, malai chhoder
Khayeka bacha ani, bishwaslai toder
Binti garchhu timilai, dui haat joder
Farki aideu priya, bato moder

Tadhai bhaepani, manko maya mardaina
Antai khusi chhau bhane, Farki aaunu pardaina

Nafarkine gari gayau, maile chahera ni rokna sakin
Aansule koreko shabdama, timi nai timi chhau kina?

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo‚Ä¶

Timro tasbir herdai, raatbhari bolchhu
Kalpanamai bhaepani, manko kura kholchhu
Samjhinchhu ti dinharu, jaba saathma timi thiyau
Maya magda badlama, kina dhoka diyau

Thaha chha timi aba, Farkera aaudaina
Maile jati aansu bagaeni, timilai paaudaina

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo‚Ä¶

Khusi hunu josanga chhau, timro bato chhekdina
Tadhai janu madekhi, aba timilai rokdina
Birsiera jau malai, samjhanama naaos
Maile paae jasto dhoka, timile napaos

Arko janma hunchha bhane, bhetna chhaina timilai
Badla lina aafnai mutu, retnu chhaina timilai
Fateko man aba, yaadko siyole siundchhu
Yo juni ta kebal, timrai naam ma jiundchhu

Bachnu chhaina aba malai mutu dukhaayera
Gahro bho haasna aba aansu lukaayera

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo

ūüėĪ Franklin Shark Attack Destroys Entire City | Indian Bikes Driving 3D | Shagun Gamerz
Ep-2

special credit - ‚Ä™ @heligamersss   

Entertainment video

Franklin faces a massive shark attack that completely destroys the entire city! In this Indian Bikes Driving 3D gameplay, dangerous sharks take over the flooded city and create total chaos. Can Franklin survive this deadly shark invasion and escape safely? Watch till the end to see the full action!

snippet.title: DJ Snake - Let Me Love You (Lyrics) ft. Justin Bieber
snippet.description:
Subscribe and press (ūüĒĒ) to join the Notification Squad and stay updated with new uploads

Follow DJ Snake:
https://soundcloud.com/djsnake
http://www.facebook.com/djsnake.fr
http://www.twitter.com/djsnake

Follow Justin Bieber:
https://www.instagram.com/lilbieber
https://www.tiktok.com/@justinbieber
https://www.facebook.com/JustinBieber

Follow Gseven Records:
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/gsevenrecords/
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/gsevenrecords/

We have an official permission from the right holders to upload this music

Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Justin Bieber]
I used to believe
We were burnin' on the edge of somethin' beautiful (Somethin' beautiful)
Somethin' beautiful (Somethin' beautiful)
Sellin' a dream
Smoke and mirrors keep us waitin' on a miracle (Oh)
On a miracle (Oh)

[Pre-Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Say, go through the darkest of days
Heaven's a heartbreak away
Never let you go, never let me down
Oh, it's been a hell of a ride
Driving the edge of a knife
Never let you go, never let me down

[Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

[Drop]

[Verse 2: Justin Bieber]
Don't fall asleep (Ooh)
At the wheel, we've got a million miles ahead of us
Miles ahead of us
All that we need (Ah)
Is a rude awakening to know we're good enough
(Yeah) Know we're good enough

[Pre-Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Say, go through the darkest of days
Heaven's a heartbreak away
Never let you go, never let me down
Oh it's been a hell of a ride
Driving the edge of a knife
Never let you go, never let me down

[Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

[Bridge: Justin Bieber]
Never let you go, never let you go-go
Never let you go, never let you go-go
Never let you go (Woah)
No, never let you go (Ooh)
Never let you go, never let you go-go
Never let you go, never let you go-go (Oh no, no, no, no)
Never let you go (Yeah)
No, never let you go (Yeah)

[Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

snippet.description:
Vaaste - 4K Video Song | Dhvani Bhanushali, Tanishk Bagchi | Bhushan K | RadhikaRao, Vinay S
Vaaste Song: Dhvani Bhanushali, TanishkBagchi Nikhil D | Bhushan Kumar |RadhikaRao, Vinay Sapru

Song : Vaaste
Singers : Dhvani Bhanushali & Nikhil D‚ÄôSouza
Music : Tanishk Bagchi 
Lyrics: Arafat Mehmood
Featuring: Siddharth Gupta and Anuj Saini
Music Label - T-Series 
Video By - Radhika Rao & Vinay Sapru
Songs Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound Of Bombay) 
Mix Assistant Engineers - Michael Edwin Pillai
Special Thanks to Azeem Dayani

Vaaste Lyrics
Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du
Badle Mein Main Tere
Jo Khuda Khud Bhi De
Jannate Sach Kahu Chhod Du

Tumse Zaada Main Na Jaanu
Tumse Khud Ko Main Pehchanu
Tumko Bas Main Apna Maanu Mahiya

Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du

Tere Alava Koi Bhi Khawish
Nahi Hai Baaki Dil Mein
Kadam Uthau Jaha Bhi Jaau
Tujhi Se Jaau Millne

Tere Liye Mera Safar
Tere Bina Main Jaau Kidhar

Tumse Zaada Main Na Jaanu
Tumse Khud Ko Main Pehchanu
Tumko Bas Main Apna Maanu Mahiya

Vaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du

Badle Mein Main Tere
Jo Khuda Khud Bhi De
Jannate Sach Kahu Chhod Du

Tu Hi Hai Sawera Mera
Tu Hi Kinara Mera
Tu Hi Hai Dariya Mera
Khuda Ka Jariya Mera
Tujhi Se Hota Shuru
Ye Mera Kaarwan
Tujhi Pe Jaake Khatam
Ye Mera Saara Jaha

Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du

ūüé§ Lyrics: Banjaare - Bairan

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–Ķ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–Ķin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

.........

.........

.........

snippet.title: Dil Aaya - Aviverse | ‚Ä™‚Ä™ @astheticavi  |‚Ä™‚Ä™ @MeAbhishekShukla   (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
STREAM All Songs Of  Aviverse : https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

"Dil Aaya" is a romantic song about the powerful feeling of falling in love just by looking into someone‚Äôs beautiful eyes. Sometimes a single glance is enough to steal a heart, and this song captures that exact emotion.

The song expresses the attraction, the charm of kajal-filled eyes, and the moment when someone becomes so special that the heart begins to dream of a future together. It is about love, admiration, and the promise of holding hands and walking through life together.

Audio Credits:

Song Name : Dil Aaya
Vocals : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Lyrics : Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Composed by : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Music Producer : Abs

Video Credits:
 
Cast:  Tanvi Duggal , Janhavi Joshi , Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Director: Joseph B. 
Producer: Avinash Kumar
Cinematographer : Vasu Menon 
Assistant Cinematographer : Archit
Line Producer: Shravan
Editor: Ajmal Rasali
Colorist: Ajmal Rasali
Poster & Thumbnail Designer: Junaid & Shreyas


Stream On Aviverse Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

Aviverse's Instagram -      / aviversemusic    
Abhishek's Instagram -       / abhishekxavi    
Avinash's Instagram -         / aesthetic_avii    

Lyrics  :  

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Haath pakad ke sang chal de tu

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Kinni soni hai, mainu lagti tu

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Jaati hai tham ab saansein meri
Jab aati tu paas mere

Ghayal karta hai tera woh kajal mujhe
Jab takti ye akhiyan tujhe

Dulhan banaunga, tujhko sajaunga
Mehndi laga ke rakhna, doli mein launga

Jo na maane ye duniya, toh ladd bhi jaunga
Haathon ko thaam le, main waada nibhaunga

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

(c) Aviverse 2026

"Dil Aaya" is a romantic song about the powerful feeling of falling in love just by looking into someone‚Äôs beautiful eyes. Sometimes a single glance is enough to steal a heart, and this song captures that exact emotion.

The song expresses the attraction, the charm of kajal-filled eyes, and the moment when someone becomes so special that the heart begins to dream of a future together. It is about love, admiration, and the promise of holding hands and walking through life together.

ml.description:
ūüĒ• ŗīģŗīĺŗīěŗĶćŗīöŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶľ ŗīĮŗĶĀŗī£ŗĶąŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗī°ŗĶć vs ŗī≤ŗīŅŗīĶŗĶľŗī™ŗĶāŗĶĺ... ŗīęŗĶąŗī®ŗĶĹ ŗīóŗĶÜŗīĮŗīŅŗīā.

ŗīáŗī§ŗīĺŗī£ŗĶć. FC ŗīģŗĶäŗī¨ŗĶąŗī≤ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶÜ ŗīěŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīłŗĶćŗīēŗĶćŗīĶŗīĺŗī°ŗĶć ŗī¨ŗīŅŗĶĹŗī°ŗĶľ ŗī¨ŗīĺŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗī™ŗīįŗīģŗĶćŗī™ŗīįŗīĮŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīÖŗīĶŗīłŗīĺŗī® ŗīéŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗīŅŗīłŗĶčŗī°ŗĶć - ŗīéŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤ŗīĺŗīā ŗīą ŗīģŗī§ŗĶćŗīłŗīįŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶáŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶć ŗīĶŗīįŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ.

ŗīęŗĶĀŗīüŗĶćŗī¨ŗĶčŗĶĺ ŗīöŗīįŗīŅŗī§ŗĶćŗīįŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶÜ ŗīŹŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĶŗī≤ŗīŅŗīĮ ŗīįŗī£ŗĶćŗīüŗĶć ŗīēŗĶćŗī≤ŗī¨ŗĶćŗī¨ŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗĶÜ - ŗīģŗīĺŗīěŗĶćŗīöŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶľ ŗīĮŗĶĀŗī£ŗĶąŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗī°ŗĶĀŗīā ŗī≤ŗīŅŗīĶŗĶľŗī™ŗĶāŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā - ŗīěŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīŅŗīöŗĶćŗīöŗĶĀ, ŗīáŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶčŗĶĺ ŗīĶŗīŅŗīúŗīĮŗīŅŗīĮŗĶÜ ŗī§ŗĶÄŗīįŗĶĀŗīģŗīĺŗī®ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĺŗī®ŗĶĀŗī≥ŗĶćŗī≥ ŗīłŗīģŗīĮŗīģŗīĺŗīĮŗīŅ.

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey - Young And Beautiful (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
‚ēį‚Ēą‚ě§ Dive into the lyrics of ‚ÄúYoung And Beautiful‚ÄĚ ‚ÄĒ a space where every word feels like it was written just for you.
Here, music is more than sound ‚ÄĒ it‚Äôs memories, emotions, and little moments that stay with us.

Lana Del Rey - Young And Beautiful (Lyrics) ‚Ė∂Ôłé ‚ÄĘŠĀäŠĀä||ŠĀä|ŠĀč||||ŠĀčŠĀä|‚ÄĘ 3:57
#LanaDelRey #pop #alternative
 
‚ēį‚Ēą‚ě§ On this channel, you‚Äôll find songs that feel straight out of an indie film: timeless classics and hidden gems waiting to become your new favorites.

ūüęį Leave a comment telling us which song moves your heart

ÔĹ°ÔĹ•:*ňö:‚úßÔĹ° ÔĹ°ÔĹ•:*ňö:‚úßÔĹ° ÔĹ°ÔĹ•:*ňö:‚úßÔĹ°ÔĹ°ÔĹ•:*ňö:‚úßÔĹ°ÔĹ°ÔĹ•:*ňö:‚úßÔĹ°

Lyrics:
I've seen the world, done it all, had my cake now
Diamonds, brilliant, and Bel Air now
Hot summer nights, mid-July
When you and I were forever wild
The crazy days, city lights
The way you'd play with me like a child
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face, and electric soul
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Dear Lord, when I get to Heaven
Please, let me bring my man
When he comes, tell me that you'll let him in
Father, tell me if you can
All that grace, all that body
All that face makes me wanna party
He's my sun, he makes me shine like diamonds
Will you still love me, when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm not young and beautiful?

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

ŗīÖŗī§ŗĶć ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗī®ŗīĺŗīĶŗīŅŗīóŗĶáŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć ŗīöŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗīĶŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīÖŗīāŗī¨ŗīįŗīöŗĶĀŗīāŗī¨ŗīŅ, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīĶŗĶľŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīĻŗĶÜŗī≤ŗīŅŗīēŗĶčŗī™ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶľ, ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗī≠ŗĶÄŗīģŗĶĽ ŗī™ŗīŅŗĶĽŗī¨ŗĶčŗĶĺ ŗīģŗĶÜŗī∑ŗĶÄŗĶĽ, ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīģŗĶĺŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗīŅŗī™ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶľ "ŗīēŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī™ŗĶćŗīöŗĶľ ŗī¶ŗīŅ ŗīęŗĶćŗī≤ŗīĺŗīóŗĶć" ŗīóŗĶÜŗīĮŗīŅŗīā ŗīÖŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶÜŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīģŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶáŗī§ŗĶÜŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīā, ŗīáŗī§ŗĶĀŗīĶŗīįŗĶÜ ŗīłŗĶćŗīĶŗī™ŗĶćŗī®ŗīā ŗīēŗīĺŗī£ŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ ŗīłŗĶÉŗī∑ŗĶćŗīüŗīŅ. ŗīĶŗĶÜŗĶľŗīöŗĶćŗīĶŗĶĹ ŗī≠ŗĶāŗīģŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīą ŗīÜŗī¶ŗĶćŗīĮ ŗī™ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶčŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗīŅŗī®ŗĶć ŗīĮŗīĺŗī§ŗĶäŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīöŗĶÜŗī≤ŗīĶŗĶĀŗīģŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤. ŗī™ŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗĶÜŗīüŗĶĀŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶāŗīüŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗīįŗīłŗīēŗīįŗīģŗīĺŗīĮ ŗīēŗīĺŗīįŗĶćŗīĮŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶāŗīüŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā, ROBLOX ŗīÖŗīāŗīóŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶć ŗīłŗĶćŗī™ŗĶÜŗī∑ŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī≤ŗīŅŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīŅ ŗī¨ŗīĺŗī°ŗĶćŗīúŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ROBLOX ŗī°ŗĶčŗī≥ŗīĪŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ("Robux") ŗī®ŗĶáŗīüŗīĺŗĶĽ ŗīēŗīīŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā. ŗīÖŗī§ŗīĺŗīēŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗĶÜ, ŗīÖŗīĶŗī§ŗīĺŗĶľ ŗīĶŗīłŗĶćŗī§ŗĶćŗīįŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīÖŗī®ŗĶĀŗī¨ŗī®ŗĶćŗīß ŗīČŗī™ŗīēŗīįŗī£ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶć ŗīďŗĶļŗī≤ŗĶąŗĶĽ ŗīēŗīĺŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗī≤ŗĶčŗīóŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗī®ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶć ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗīĺŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗĶÄŗīģŗīŅŗīĮŗīā ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗī£ ŗīłŗīĺŗīģŗīóŗĶćŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶĺ, ŗīłŗīāŗīĶŗĶáŗī¶ŗī®ŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗīģŗīē ŗīėŗīüŗīēŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīĶŗĶľŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗī® ŗīłŗīāŗīĶŗīŅŗīßŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ ŗīéŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗīŅŗīĶ ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗīĺŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīēŗīīŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā.

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better

(Lyrics)
[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burnin' through the hours talkin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is, but I got that feelin'
Wakin' up in this bed next to you, swear the room, yeah, it got no ceilin'
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talkin'
I might have to tell you somethin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Lay here with me, ayy, ayy, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (Yes, I do, yes, I do, baby)
I like me better when I'm with you (Oh no)
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh no)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Tags:

Lay here with me ayy ayy ooh
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better
When I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I am with you
I Like Me Better

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I can‚Äôt believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide ūüöÄ https://feastables.com/pages/find-a-store

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store

https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek‚Āüdafe

Neele‚Āüphool‚Āülaau tere liye
Khat‚Āülikhu tere liye
Mai‚Āükhuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
T–Ķri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau ter–Ķ liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye‚Ä¶

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye
